meta.description: LibreOffice suite (Writer, Calc, Impress) on Windows. One soffice process hosts all open documents as separate top-level windows (class SALFRAME). Content operations (read/write/format/save) use LibreOfficeWin.exe via the UNO bridge. Keystroke and window-management operations use KeyWin.exe with HANDLE:<hwnd>.

LibreOffice runs one soffice process (soffice.bin owns the windows; soffice.exe is the launcher). Each document is a separate SALFRAME window. SALSUBFRAME windows are dialogs / floating panels.
Two helpers cooperate: LibreOfficeWin.exe — document content: QUERYTREE READ WRITE FORMAT SAVE NEWDOC LISTDOCS KeyWin.exe — window/UI: SENDKEYS LISTWINDOWS CLICKID on HANDLE:<hwnd>
Identify windows: LISTWINDOWS → entries with process="soffice.bin" or process="soffice.exe" Document windows: title contains "LibreOffice Writer" / "LibreOffice Calc" / "LibreOffice Impress" or the document filename + " - LibreOffice …" Dialog / panel windows: title does NOT contain app name keywords; Win32 class = SALSUBFRAME.
CRITICAL — TRANSIENT WINDOWS (see <transient_ui> section): Some dialogs appear only after specific actions (e.g. NEWDOC impress → template chooser, Find & Replace → dialog, Save As → file dialog). They are NOT present unless triggered. If you see an unexpected SALSUBFRAME window via LISTWINDOWS, it is a modal dialog that must normally be dismissed (ESC or Enter) before any other command will be processed. Use KeyWin SENDKEYS {ESC} or {ENTER} on HANDLE:<hwnd> of the dialog window.

binary.note: Main launcher; real window owner is soffice.bin on the same path
Actual LO process owning SALFRAME/SALSUBFRAME windows

Control.note: Writer document window — always has WS_MAXIMIZEBOX
Control.label: LibreOffice Writer document window

Identified by: title matches /LibreOffice Writer/ or /\.odt|\.docx/ + " - LibreOffice". Win32 class: SALFRAME. Has WS_MAXIMIZEBOX set. Document operations: use LibreOfficeWin.exe with target="writer". Keystroke operations: use KeyWin.exe with target="HANDLE:<hwnd>". Key SENDKEYS shortcuts (send via KeyWin to HANDLE:<hwnd>): {CTRL+S} save {CTRL+Z} undo {CTRL+Y} redo {CTRL+A} select all {CTRL+C} copy {CTRL+V} paste {CTRL+F} find {CTRL+H} find+replace {CTRL+P} print {ALT+F4} close window

Control.note: Calc spreadsheet window — always has WS_MAXIMIZEBOX
Control.label: LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet window

Identified by: title matches /LibreOffice Calc/ or /\.ods|\.xlsx/. Document operations: use LibreOfficeWin.exe with target="calc". Key cell path forms: "A1", "Sheet1!B3", "body/sheet[@name='X']/cell[@addr='B2']".

Control.note: Impress presentation window — always has WS_MAXIMIZEBOX
Control.label: LibreOffice Impress presentation window

Identified by: title matches /LibreOffice Impress/ or /\.odp|\.pptx/. Document operations: use LibreOfficeWin.exe with target="impress". Slide path forms: "slide[1]", "slide[1]/shape[1]", "slide[2]/shape[@name='Title']".
IMPORTANT — template chooser dialog on NEWDOC: When LibreOfficeWin.exe NEWDOC impress is called, LibreOffice may show a "Select Template" / "New Presentation" dialog (SALSUBFRAME, no WS_MAXIMIZEBOX) BEFORE or concurrently with the document window. LibreOfficeWin.exe attempts to automatically dismiss it via WM_CLOSE + ESC. If it persists (visible via KeyWin LISTWINDOWS as a SALSUBFRAME window), dismiss it manually: KeyWin SENDKEYS {ESC} or {ENTER} on HANDLE:<hwnd> of the dialog window. See scenarios.xml scenario id="newdoc-impress".

TransientWindow.trigger: NEWDOC impress (first call, or when no blank template is default)
TransientWindow.label: Impress "Select Template" / "New Presentation" dialog

Appears when LibreOfficeWin.exe NEWDOC impress is called and LibreOffice shows a template chooser before opening the blank slide.
Detection via KeyWin LISTWINDOWS: Process: soffice.bin (or soffice.exe) Title: "Select Template" / "Vybrat šablonu" / "Vorlage auswählen" (locale-dependent) OR a short non-app-name title — anything NOT containing "LibreOffice", "Writer", "Calc", "Impress", "OpenOffice" Win32 class: SALSUBFRAME (dialog / floating window) WS_MAXIMIZEBOX bit: NOT set (always absent on dialogs)
LibreOfficeWin.exe automatically tries to dismiss this dialog with WM_CLOSE + ESC during the NEWDOC poll loop. If it still appears in LISTWINDOWS after NEWDOC returns, dismiss it with: KeyWin SENDKEYS {ESC} on HANDLE:<hwnd> — cancels → blank presentation KeyWin SENDKEYS {ENTER} on HANDLE:<hwnd> — accepts default template
After dismissal the Impress document window (SALFRAME + WS_MAXIMIZEBOX) becomes visible.

step.note: Cancel template chooser — opens blank presentation

TransientWindow.trigger: SAVE on a new (unsaved) document, or explicit Save As

step.note: Type destination path into file dialog

TransientWindow.label: Find & Replace dialog. Non-modal in LibreOffice (document still reachable). Title: "Find & Replace" / locale variant. Dismiss: SENDKEYS {ESC} on HANDLE:<hwnd> of the dialog, or SENDKEYS {ALT+F4}.

TransientWindow.trigger: Tools → Macros → Edit, or macro error
TransientWindow.label: LibreOffice Basic IDE window (full SALFRAME, has WS_MAXIMIZEBOX). Title contains "Basic IDE" or "Basic". Close with SENDKEYS {ALT+F4} on HANDLE:<hwnd> of the IDE window.
